General.Name: World-Link Logistics Asia Holding Ltd
General.Description: World-Link Logistics (Asia) Holding Limited, an investment holding company, provides logistics services in Hong Kong and Macau. It operates through Supply Chain Management Service Business  and Full Service Distribution Business segments. The company provides warehousing, transportation, and value-added services; and customisation services. It engages in the wholesale and trading of goods. In addition, it provides warehouse and inventory management arrangements, transportation services. It primarily serves fast moving consumer goods and food and beverages sectors. The company was founded in 1990 and is headquartered in Tsuen Wan, Hong Kong.
General.Address: Allied Cargo Centre, Tsuen Wan, Hong Kong
